name: Super Retro GP
short_description: Inspired by SEGA's Virtua Racing, Super Retro GP is a modern retro arcade racing game featuring a clean flat shaded polygon retro aesthetic with modern lighting effects to help it stand out without losing the retro charm.
detailed_description:
Inspired by SEGA's Virtua Racing, Super Retro GP is a modern retro arcade racing game featuring a clean flat shaded polygon retro aesthetic with modern lighting effects to help it stand out without losing the retro charm.

Current available features are:

4 unlocked cars with Different Handling Characteristics: Choose from a variety of vehicles, each with unique handling.
4 unlocked courses
Arcade Mode: Experience fast-paced racing action reminiscent of old-school arcades.
Time Attack: Test your skills against ghost cars and aim for the best lap times.
Ghost cars
20 CPU racers
Forward, reverse, mirrored and reverse mirrored course configurations
Dynamic Time of Day Effects: Watch the lighting change as you race through different times of day.
Leaderboards for fastest lap and goal time per course

Compatible with force feedback steering wheels and pedals.

Features to be released during early access:
16 more cars to unlock
6 more courses to unlock
Grand Prix Mode: Compete in championship races across various courses.
Endurance mode
Online multiplayer

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
